card.name: The Elk King
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player or battle, choose one that hasn't been chosen. Create a creature token with those characteristics. If all have been chosen, draw a card instead. • 3/3 green Elk Spirit. • 2/2 white Wolf Spirit with lifelink. • 1/1 white Bird Spirit with flying.

card.name: Ballad of the Uncut Thread
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token. You gain 2 life. Scry 3. Shuffle up to four cards from your graveyard into your library. If exactly four cards were shuffled in this way, draw a card.

card.name: From Triumph to Tomb
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create a 1/1 white Human Warrior creature token. II — Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn. III — You may sacrifice a creature. If you do, create a 4/4 black Zombie Noble creature token.

card.name: Verse of the Stolen Kiss
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. II — Put a menace counter on target creature you control. III — Up to two target creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Unraveling the Jaspera
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Unraveling the Jaspera deals 3 damage to any target. II — You may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. III — Create a snow Treasure token.

card.name: Horns Against Scale
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Put two +1/+1 counters and a lifelink counter on target creature you control. Target creature you control deals damage to target creature or planeswalker you don't control equal to its power. ​

card.name: Ballad of Starnheim
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Destroy target creature or planeswalker you don't control. II — You gain 2 life and each opponent loses 2 life. III — Each player draws two cards.

card.name: Cinders that Carve Strength
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) You may cast a spell from your hand with mana value equal to or less than the number of lore counters on Cinders that Carve Strength. ​ ​

card.name: Restoration of Jormund
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Create two 1/1 green Elf Warrior creature tokens. Target creature you control gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of Elves you control. ​

card.name: A Tale of Gold and Flame
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Exile the top five cards of your library. You may play them as long as you control A Tale of Gold and Flame. Add {R}{W}. You can't use this mana to cast spells from your hand. You gain life equal to the number of cards exiled by A Tale of Gold and Flame.

card.name: Traverse Kaldheim
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Mill four cards. You may return a snow card or a double-faced card milled this way to your hand. If you don't, you gain 2 life. You may play an additional land this turn. Until end of turn, lands you control enter untapped. ​

card.text: Creatures can't attack you or battles you protect unless their controller pays {2} for each creature they control that's attacking you or a battle you protect. 2W — 4

card.name: Reciter of Tales
card.text: Flying Orate — Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, create a white Saga enchantment token with "r{3}—Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it."

card.name: Speaker of Bretagard
card.text: Whenever a Saga you control enters or leaves the battlefield, create a 1/1 white Human creature token. Orate — {4}{W}: Create a white Saga enchantment token with "r{3}—You gain 3 life."

card.name: Prepare for Starnheim
card.text: Until end of turn, if a creature dying causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time. Destroy all creatures.

card.name: Istfell Wanderer
card.text: Vigilance Teamwork — Vigilance (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a noncreature, you may put a vigilance counter on another target permanent you control.) {2}{U}, {T}, Tap X untapped creatures you control: Look at the top X cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Runebound Mentor
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may draw a card. 1UU — 5

card.name: Volatile Spellcatcher
card.text: Flash Changeling (This card is every creature type.) Flying When Volatile Spellcatcher enters, you may put tap it and put two stun counters on it. If you do, counter target noncreature spell.

card.name: Giant's Rebuff
card.text: Return each creature with toughness 3 or less to its owner's hand.

card.name: Elskul Rager
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice a creature: Put a menace counter and two +1/+1 counters on Elskul Rager if it isn't a Demon. It becomes a Demon in addition to its other types. {2}, Sacrifice a creature: If Elskul Rager is a Demon, put three +1/+1 counters and a lifelink counter on it if it isn't legendary. It becomes legendary and named The Slayer of Elskul. {3}, Sacrifice a creature: If Elskul Rager is legendary, each opponent sacrifices a creature.

card.name: Skelle Scorn Pole
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Creatures you don't control get -1/-1. Whenever a creature you control dies, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Sarulf, Dread-Wolf
card.text: At the beginning of combat on each player's turn, that player chooses another creature. Destroy that creature and put a +1/+1 counter on Sarulf, Dread-Wolf.

card.name: Olsen Moltenhand
card.text: Whenever Olsen Moltenhand attacks while modified, his base power and toughness become 4/4, it gains flying, and is a Dragon in addition to his types. (He's modified as long as there's an Equipment or Aura attached to him or a counter on him. This doesn't end at end of turn.)

card.name: Surtland Lumberjack
card.text: Trample At the beginning of combat on your turn, exile the top card of your library. You may then create a 1/1 red Berserker creature token with haste. If you don't, you may play the exiled card this turn. 2RR — 6

card.name: Heirloom Fang
card.text: Equipped creature has double strike and "Whenever this creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it." Equip {3}

card.name: Horncaller of the Kannah
card.text: Reach If one or more Saga tokens would be created under your control, twice that many of those tokens are created instead.

card.name: The Raider's Trail
card.text: Whenever put one or more counters on a creature you control, you may put that many of those kinds of counters on The Raider's Trail. At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may have The Raider's Trail become a 2/2 Phyrexian Beast enchantment creature until end of turn.

card.name: Blighted Pack
card.text: Create a 2/2 green snow Phyrexian Wolf creature token for each snow permanent you control.

card.name: Ciar's Fleshroot
card.text: Vigilance You may play an additional land on each of your turns. 1G — 3

card.name: Ode to Discovery BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "Saevel calls from beyond the snow, To paths untouched by hearth or throne, Where only wandering feet may go." III — Exile up to one target creature, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. ​

card.name: Ode to Kin BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "Ingalvur walks where first steps fall, Through newborn roads and untamed glen, And teaches wandering hearts to call." III — You gain 3 life. ​

card.name: Ode to Returns BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "The sagas swell with every cheer, For heroes home from blood and frost, Till all their names ring bright and clear." III — Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. ​

card.name: Ode to the Departed BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "Through silver mist the path is shown, Where voices fade and shadows stay, Till halls of Istfell claim their own." III — Create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying. ​

card.name: Ode to Visions BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "Vinrormr dreams in serpent sleep, While stars dissolve in moss and rain, And secrets drown where old gods weep." III — Draw a card. ​

card.name: Ode to Ashes BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "Bari kissed the dying flame, And held the lonely through the night, Till grief and longing spoke one name." III — Exile each opponent's graveyard. ​

card.name: Ode to Binding BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "The Dread-Wolf clawed through sky and stone, But Vragi carved the spell alone, And sealed the beast with blood and bone." III — Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. ​

card.name: Ode to Dread BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "Hagduin smiles behind your face, And whispers truths you dare not keep, Till shadows learn to wear your place." III — Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. ​

card.name: Ode to Folly BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "Her voice rang fierce in midnight air, Unknowing of the demon's glare— A tale cut short, stripped cold and bare." III — Create a 6/6 black Demon creature token. You lose 6 life unless you sacrifice a Cleric. ​

card.name: Ode to the Vessel BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "Split the soul, and twist the bone. Let it walk, but not alone." III — Return a creature card named Oilbound Spawn from your graveyard to the battlefield. If you can't, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. ​

card.name: Ode to Cunning BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "Knud walks grinning through the blaze, Where endings carve the road ahead, And clever fools survive the haze." III — You may discard up to two cards. If you do, draw that many cards. ​

card.name: Ode to the Storm BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "The clouds are canvas, storms the hue, Each stroke a flash, each word a blaze, Till sky itself bends to the few." III — Return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand. ​

card.name: Ode to Exploration BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "The waves have carried us afar, Through omenpaths both wide and strange, Till home remembers where we are." III — Search your library for a land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. ​

card.name: Ode to Renewal BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "Koma coils beneath the stone, Through silent earth your heartbeat drums, Return, and claim the world your own." III — Create a 3/3 blue Serpent creature token named Koma's Coil. ​

card.name: Ode to the Clans BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "Through grief we march, through cold we bear, With heart and will to see it through, Till Bretagard stands whole and fair." III — Create two 1/1 white Human creature tokens. ​

card.name: Ode to Valor BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "Lathril stood with fang and spear, While beasts and warriors bled as one, And taught the trembling not to fear." III — Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. ​

card.name: Harald, Speaker for Koma
card.text: Whenever Harald, Speaker for Koma or another nontoken Elf you control enters, create a 1/1 green Elf Warrior creature token. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Ode to the Hunt BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "Aldegar walked where dead kings sleep, Through frozen vault and shattered stone, To claim the gold the grave could not keep." III — Create two Snow Treasure tokens. ​

card.name: Ode to Pursuit BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "Aldegar watched with patient eye, While prey grew bold beneath the trees, Then painted red the falling sky." III — Ode to Pursuit deals 3 damage to any target. ​

card.name: Ode to Obedience BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "The barrows cracked in deathly frost, As hollow eyes opened once more, For jarls remember every lost." III — Create a 2/2 black Zombie Warrior creature token. Each opponent loses 2 life. ​

card.name: Ode to Legacy BRE
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — "The hall rang out with ancient praise, From voices worn by death and cold, Repeating long forgotten days." III — Cast a card you own in exile with a story counter on it without paying its mana cost. ​
